The '''Cargo Master Z-12 Speeder Truck''' was manufactured by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]] for the military. 20 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, it carried a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], and 24 troops. It boasted one heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] turret.
